name_cn:
Available in Black & Gold
DIOR Lady calfskin with 4-gold buckle
As a classic icon, the Lady is a safe bet
It looks very gentle and elegant when carried by hand
The 4-gauge size is more grand and stable than the 3-gauge, a series you won't regret
I always recommend girls have a classic piece
Every color looks great
20×16.5×8cm
Style: 6604
